message:
feat(abi): add 16 Tier 6 symbols (lxattr, prlimit, sysinfo, utmp, eventfd helpers)

New symbols: lgetxattr, lsetxattr, llistxattr, lremovexattr (RawSyscall),
prlimit, prlimit64 (RawSyscall), get_nprocs, get_nprocs_conf,
get_phys_pages, get_avphys_pages (GlibcCallThrough), getutent, setutent,
endutent, utmpname (GlibcCallThrough), eventfd_read, eventfd_write
(Implemented). Total symbols: 787.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
